1.title: India Education Expo 2024 at Crossroads Hotel
1.content: A prestigious gathering where Indian education officials showcased opportunities for Malawian students, attended by distinguished guests at Crossroads Hotel. This event connected hundreds of students with top Indian universities offering scholarships and programs in engineering, medicine, business, and IT.
1.excerpt: India education officials showcase opportunities for Malawian students at Crossroads Hotel expo.

2.title: Celebrating 50+ Students Awarded Partial Scholarships to India
2.content: A mentorship and send-off ceremony honored over 50 students embarking on their academic journey to India with partial scholarships. Mtendere organized comprehensive pre-departure training covering academics, culture adaptation, visa processes, and career planning.
2.excerpt: Mentorship ceremony for 50+ students heading to India with scholarships.

3.title: Students Departure at Kamuzu International Airport
3.content: An emotional moment as students departed from KIA, heading to various universities abroad to begin their higher education journeys. Families, staff, and well-wishers gathered to celebrate this major milestone in the students' lives.
3.excerpt: Emotional send-off at KIA for students heading abroad.

4.title: European Education Expo with GEDU at Crossroads Hotel
4.content: Mtendere Education Consult partnered with GEDU to host an expo that connected students and institutions across Europe and Malawi. Over 30 European universities presented programs in business, engineering, healthcare, and social sciences.
4.excerpt: Partnership expo connecting Malawian students with European universities.

5.title: UK University Fair Lilongwe 2024
5.content: Leading UK universities gathered in Lilongwe to meet prospective Malawian students. Sessions covered undergraduate/postgraduate programs, scholarships, accommodation, and student visa requirements. Mtendere facilitated direct university applications on-site.
5.excerpt: UK universities meet Malawian students at Lilongwe fair.
